channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Did ACC officials miss a targeting call in Cal’s loss to Miami? Our analysis of the controversial play
item.description: The controversial no-call led to the Hurricanes' game-winning drive in a 39-38 victory Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Sky officials are light on details in discussing their decision to fire Weatherspoon after 1 year
item.description: BEDFORD PARK, Ill. (AP) — Chicago Sky officials were light on specifics Wednesday when discussing their decision to fire former coach Teresa Weatherspoon after one season, saying there was no particular catalyst and that it was simply time to move on from the Naismith Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tigers tap Keider Montero to open ALDS Game 3, with manager A.J. Hinch seeking more bullpen magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Tigers plan to put right-hander Keider Montero on the mound against the Cleveland Guardians in Game 3 of their AL Division Series on Wednesday, when one team will earn an edge in the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SEC means more ... upsets? Three top 10 teams fall, led by Vanderbilt's vanquishing of Alabama
item.description: The Southeastern Conference’s biggest shakeups haven’t come courtesy of newcomers Oklahoma and Texas so far, but from more unlikely culprits.
item.dc:creator: John Zenor, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ex-NFL Media journalist says he’s reached a settlement with the league on discrimination lawsuit
item.description: A former NFL Media journalist announced Wednesday that he’s reached a settlement with the NFL to resolve a lawsuit in which he accused the league of refusing to address long-standing institutional discrimination while also alleging his contract was not renewed because he repeatedly voiced concerns r
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jets’ Aaron Rodgers shuts down rumors he played a role in Robert Saleh’s dismissal as ‘patently false’
item.description: New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers shut down rumors on Wednesday that he played a role in the team's decision to part ways with head coach Robert Saleh after three seasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots' Jabrill Peppers hits commissioner's exempt list after arrest
item.description: New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers was placed on the commissioner's exempt list on Wednesday after his arrest in Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is placed on commissioner's exempt list after his arrest
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The NFL has placed New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers on the exempt list while he goes through the legal process following his arrest on charges that he shoved his girlfriend’s head into the wall and choked her.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 teams suing NASCAR ask court to allow them to compete under new charter agreement as case proceeds
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The two teams suing NASCAR asked a judge for a preliminary injunction Wednesday so they can compete next season under the charter system they are challenging as their antitrust case moves through federal court.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wimbledon tennis tournament replaces line judges with technology in break with tradition
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Wimbledon is replacing line judges with electronic line-calling, the latest step into the modern age by the oldest Grand Slam tennis tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chiefs star implores Taylor Swift to keep coming to games
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star Justin Reid implored Taylor Swift to come to all of the team's games as they have yet to lose this year with her in the building.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jürgen Klopp to take on new role as head of global soccer at Red Bull
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Former Liverpool coach Jürgen Klopp is returning to soccer after a shorter than expected break. Energy drinks manufacturer Red Bull announced Wednesday that the German mentor is to become its head of global soccer from January, overseeing its international network of clubs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Grimace takes the 7 train to the Mets game
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – Like many other Mets fans, Grimace took the No. 7 train to the Mets game at Citi Field Tuesday. The Amazins sold out Citi Field for Game 3 of the National League Division Series against the Phillies. Given the crowd, fans were encouraged to take public transit to the game.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Padres return to Petco Park in NLDS: What to know before you go
item.description: San Diego Padres fans are ecstatic to welcome back their team to Petco Park for games three and four of the National League Division Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: 8 Real Salt Lake players and staff nominated for MLS end-of-season awards
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni and seven players have been named to the shortlist of nominees for Major League Soccer's end-of-season awards, highlighting the Utah club's standout 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Carson Lantz, ABC 4

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Las Vegas Raiders 34-18
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— In the second quarter, with the Broncos trailing 10-3 and defending the goal line, Gardner Minshew threw an interception to Patrick Surtain II, who returned it for a 100-yard touchdown. The pick-six was one of Surtain’s two interceptions on the night.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers becomes the 9th NFL player to throw for 60,000 yards
item.description: Aaron Rodgers reached another milestone in his stellar career on Sunday by becoming just the ninth player in NFL history to throw for 60,000 yards in regular-season games.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: LeBron James reveals why he joined the Lakers
item.description: The NBA season is right around the corner, but the league's oldest player still had some time on his hands on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
